name: Indian Coconut Rice Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak 2 cups long grain rice in water.
2. Meanwhile, boil 2 cups coconut milk and 1.5 cups water with 1 tablespoon grated fresh ginger.
3. Drain the rice and add it to the boiling coconut milk mixture; bring back to a boil and then cover and turn off the heat.
4. In a separate pan, fry 4 tablespoons oil and 1.5 teaspoons mustard seeds until they pop. Add 8 chopped dried red chillies and brown them.
5. Brown 1/3 cup sesame seeds lightly in the same pan.
6. Pour the flavored oil mixture over the rice, tossing to combine with 1 cup flaked fresh coconut (or dried unsweetened coconut that has been soaked).
